events.d: {"description":"Reviewed existing patterns. Created feature files with @ignore tags. Planned domain, application, infrastructure, and API layers."}

{"description":"Enabled 2 walking skeleton scenarios. Created all production code (domain, application, infrastructure, API layers) and test infrastructure. Build succeeds, scenarios not yet validated."}
{"description":"Unit tests not separately written for walking skeleton — acceptance tests cover the vertical slice. Production code validated through green acceptance tests."}

{"description":"Both walking skeleton scenarios pass: Authenticated reader posts a comment (201), Reader sees existing comments on a post (200 with count=2, chronological order). 110 acceptance tests pass total."}

{"description":"Walking skeleton complete. Comment entity, CommentText/CommentId VOs, ICommentRepository, PostComment+GetComments use cases, CommentEndpoints, EfCommentRepository, CommentConfiguration, migration, CommentApiDriver, CommentSteps."}
